ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the country (latitude, longitude) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness score entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "happiness_rank" INTEGER /* Happiness rank of the country */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score of the country */,
  "economy_gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Economy (GDP per capita) of the country */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy of the country */,
  "freedom" REAL /* Freedom score of the country */,
  "trust_government_corruption" REAL /* Trust in government and corruption score of the country */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support score of the country */,
  "freedom_to_make_life_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices score of the country */,
  "generosity_to_others" REAL /* Generosity to others score of the country */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption score of the country */,
  "life_ladder" REAL /* Life ladder score of the country */,
  "positive_affect" REAL /* Positive affect score of the country */,
  "negative_affect" REAL /* Negative affect score of the country */,
  "confidence_in_national_government" REAL /* Confidence in national government score of the country */,
  "dystopia_residual" REAL /* Dystopia residual score of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the happiness scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for tracking sessions */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the access was successful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
